title: Robinhood (HOOD) Q3 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Pre-earnings analysis of Robinhood's Q3 2024 results identifying key metrics and expectations. Q3 2024 Preview: Robinhood was expected to report strong Q3 2024 results driven by continued trading momentum. Key Metrics to Monitor: Revenue Growth: Expected to show continued sequential growth from Q2. Analyst expectations in $600-650M range for revenue. Options Trading: Expected to reach new records given sustained options market interest. Crypto volumes: Key indicator given crypto market strength in Q3 2024. Gold Subscribers: Expected to continue expansion toward 2.5M+ level. Assets Under Custody: Expected to approach $150B+ milestone given market gains and net deposits. Key Drivers: Options trading surge due to market volatility and retail interest. Crypto revenue strength with Bitcoin and Ethereum rallying. Margin trading and cash balances growing. New product launches (Legend desktop platform). Analyst Expectations: Transaction-based revenue growth 60%+ year-over-year. Options contracts new record. Crypto volumes accelerating. EPS expected in $0.55-0.62 range. Investor Focus: Product diversification beyond core equity trading. Ability to monetize new user features. Execution on growth initiatives. Valuation support at elevated multiples.
